description: S44F - Create plus_panel_widget.dart with Skills/Connectors/Attach rows, spring slide animation, and update chat_screen.dart to add _isPanelOpen state, toggle callback, and show PlusPanelWidget above input bar. Update the + button in _buildInputBar to rotate 45deg when panel is open.
steps: Create frontend/lib/presentation/widgets/chat/plus_panel_widget.dart as a StatefulWidget that takes: bool isOpen, VoidCallback onToggle, String userPlan (e.g. 'free', 'basic', 'pro'), List<String> connectedProviders (for connector state).
Implement the panel with AnimatedSize or SizeTransition: when isOpen, shows content with spring animation (300ms easeOutCubic open, 200ms close).
Panel layout: Background AppColors.bgSecondary, border top 1px AppColors.borderDefault, border radius top 16px, padding 16px horizontal 12px vertical.

Row 1 - Skills section: Label 'SKILLS' (DM Sans 10px weight 600 uppercase letterSpacing 1.2 textMuted), gap 10px, horizontal scrollable row of chips. Chips: Web Search (Icons.search_outlined, basic+pro), Calculator (Icons.calculate_outlined, basic+pro), Translator (Icons.translate_outlined, basic+pro), Deep Research (Icons.biotech_outlined, pro only), Image Gen (Icons.image_outlined, pro only), Code Runner (Icons.code_outlined, pro only). Chip style: bgTertiary background, 1px borderDefault, radius 20px, padding 8h 14v, DM Sans 13px w500. Active chip: persian 15% opacity bg, 1px persian border, persian text. Locked chip: opacity 0.4, lock icon 12px at end, on tap show upgrade bottom sheet.

Row 2 - Connectors section (Pro only): Label 'CONNECTORS' same style. If not Pro: single chip 'Unlock Connectors' with dashed persian border, persian text, on tap upgrade sheet. If Pro: horizontal scroll of provider chips (Google Drive, Gmail, Calendar, Notion, GitHub, Slack, Jira, Linear, Zapier) with placeholder icons, connected ones get persian border.

Row 3 - Attach section: Label 'ATTACH' same style, gap 10px, row of 4 buttons (64x64 containers, bgTertiary, 1px borderDefault, radius 12px): Photos (Icons.photo_library_outlined), File (Icons.attach_file_outlined), Camera (Icons.camera_alt_outlined), Scan (Icons.document_scanner_outlined). Free plan: show lock overlay on all (semi-transparent overlay, lock icon center, on tap upgrade sheet).

In chat_screen.dart: Add bool _isPanelOpen = false state. Add a _togglePanel method. Update the Column in build to show PlusPanelWidget(isOpen: _isPanelOpen, ...) above _buildInputBar(isDark). Pass toggle callback and file selection callbacks.

In _buildInputBar: Replace FileUploadWidget with a GestureDetector + AnimatedRotation for the + button. When _isPanelOpen, rotate 45deg (turns: 0.125). Icon is Icons.add, on tap calls _togglePanel. When panel closed rotates back to 0. Animation 200ms easeOutCubic.
Add the import for plus_panel_widget.dart in chat_screen.dart.
acceptance_criteria: Panel slides up with spring animation when opened
Panel has Skills, Connectors, and Attach rows with correct styling
Locked chips show lock icon and trigger upgrade sheet on tap
+ button rotates 45deg when panel is open
chat_screen.dart shows PlusPanelWidget above input bar
verification: Read back plus_panel_widget.dart and verify all sections are implemented
Read back chat_screen.dart and verify panel integration, state management, and + button rotation
Check all imports resolve to existing files
findings: Created plus_panel_widget.dart with Skills (6 skill chips with plan-based locking), Connectors (pro-only with provider chips), and Attach (4 file picker buttons with free-plan lock overlay) sections. Used AnimatedSize with easeOutCubic for open/close animation. Integrated into chat_screen.dart above _buildInputBar with _isPanelOpen state. Replaced FileUploadWidget in _buildInputBar with GestureDetector + AnimatedRotation for the + button (rotates 45deg when open). Kept file_upload_widget.dart import since FileUploadWidget.buildFilePreview is still used in _buildFilePreviewBar.
